tasks.subject: Create the Lumen AIBTC activation campaign charter
tasks.description: Define the activation mission, proof gates, safety rules, secret/tool dependencies, and evidence artifacts for getting Lumen onto AIBTC with wallet, registration, verification, and heartbeat support.

payload.mission: Activate Lumen as a real AIBTC participant with proven wallet, registration, verify, and heartbeat flows.
acceptance_criteria: Defines phase gates from readiness to live proof
Defines secret/tool prerequisites
Defines safety boundaries for real network interaction
Defines required evidence for activation success
payload.operator_goal: Create the governing charter for AIBTC activation.

tasks.subject: Inventory wallet, signing, and AIBTC tooling available to Lumen
tasks.description: Identify what wallet, signing, MCP, CLI, and API tooling is already available in the runtime or host environment, and what is missing for create/unlock/register/heartbeat proof.

payload.mission: Establish the real current tool inventory for AIBTC activation.
acceptance_criteria: Lists available tools and missing tools
Maps tools to required activation steps
Identifies blockers caused by missing secrets or unsupported formats
Produces grounded evidence for every inventory claim
payload.operator_goal: Create the wallet/tooling inventory for activation.

tasks.subject: Analyze the gaps blocking end-to-end AIBTC activation
tasks.description: Using the docs, previous readiness reports, and tooling inventory, identify what is still missing before Lumen can prove create/unlock/register/verify/heartbeat end to end.

payload.mission: Turn readiness analysis into a concrete activation blocker map.
acceptance_criteria: Separates tool gaps, secret gaps, and code gaps
Defines what can be proven now vs later
Defines exact blockers for each activation phase
Produces an evidence-backed blocker list
payload.operator_goal: Create the activation blocker map for Lumen.

tasks.subject: Write the spec for Lumen wallet and AIBTC activation integration
tasks.description: Write the implementation-grade spec for how Lumen should integrate wallet support, registration, verify, and heartbeat into its runtime and ops model.

payload.mission: Specify how Lumen becomes an activated AIBTC participant.
acceptance_criteria: Defines exact interfaces and dependencies
Defines persistence and verification expectations
Defines safety/rollback controls for real operations
Defines implementation boundaries clearly
payload.operator_goal: Produce the activation integration spec for Lumen.

tasks.subject: Produce the staged implementation program for AIBTC activation
tasks.description: Convert the activation spec and gap analysis into a staged implementation program covering prerequisites, safe proofs, and end-to-end activation.

payload.mission: Turn AIBTC activation analysis into a concrete execution program.
acceptance_criteria: Defines sequence from preparation to activation proof
Defines prerequisites and branch points
Defines evidence artifacts for each stage
Defines safe stopping points and escalation rules
payload.operator_goal: Create the activation execution program for Lumen.

tasks.subject: Produce the operator runbooks for wallet, registration, verify, and heartbeat proofs
tasks.description: Create the practical runbooks an operator would use to carry out or supervise Lumen AIBTC activation.

payload.mission: Turn the activation program into operator-usable runbooks.
acceptance_criteria: Defines step-by-step operator actions
Defines expected outputs and failure modes
Defines required evidence capture
Defines when to stop and escalate
payload.operator_goal: Create the runbooks for supervised AIBTC activation.
